default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Dave Capone to explore a potential senior role at fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Dave has extensive experience in SEO, e-commerce, and content strategy across major platforms (Fanatics, Red Ventures, TripAdvisor)](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [fwd.digital is closing a $12M Series A, building AI-powered content workflows for rapid scaling](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Role discussed: Managing Director, overseeing 10-16 accounts, managing teams, and product development](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Compensation in $200k range + equity discussed; follow-up meeting scheduled for next day](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)

## Topics

### Dave's Background and Experience

  - [Started in tech sales, transitioned to SEO and e-commerce](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Built Fanatics' SEO to $300M business, managing 330+ websites](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Worked at Red Ventures, Job Case, and currently at TripAdvisor](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Passionate about building, problem-solving, and taking calculated risks](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Experienced in AI applications, particularly at TripAdvisor](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

### fwd.digital Overview

  - [Founded by ex-Zapier head of engineering/product](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [Raised $12M Series A](https://fathom.video/share/X6U4AwZFYBsqsikuWEsR1j37-rqsz1g_?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
